---
title: A brief introduction to scikit-learn
description: Traditional machine learning with &nbsp;[![](img/logo_sklearn.png){width="1.4em"}](https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn)
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

This short course introduces machine learning and the very popular [scikit-learn library](https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn), then goes over two examples using classic datasets.

:::

<br>
[[Start course ➤](sk_intro.qmd)]{.topinline}

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LearningResource",
  "name": "A brief introduction to machine learning with scikit-learn",
  "description": "This short course introduces machine learning and the very popular scikit-learn library, then goes over two examples using classic datasets.",
  "url": "https://mint.westdri.ca/ai/top_sk",
  "learningResourceType": "course",
  "inLanguage": "en",
  "license": "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/",
  "provider": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "SFU Research Computing Group"
  },
  "keywords": "machine learning, Python, scikit-learn",
  "author": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Marie-Hélène Burle"
  }
}
</script>
